No Poverty.reason: The study of tax systems, including "公益機構之免稅" (tax exemption for public interest institutions), indirectly supports policy frameworks for social protection, linking to Target 1.3.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education and "財稅專業知識" (professional knowledge in public finance and taxation) for employment, aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.4.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course mentions "能源稅及環境稅" (Energy tax and environmental tax), which are fiscal tools that can influence energy consumption patterns, relating to Target 7.a.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Provides "財稅專業知識" (professional knowledge) on topics like "營利事業所得稅" (corporate income tax), which is essential for business operations and job creation (Targets 8.3, 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Understanding "營利事業所得稅" (corporate income tax) is fundamental for industrial enterprises and their access to financial services, supporting sustainable industrialization (Targets 9.2, 9.3).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course focuses on "綜合所得稅" (individual income tax) and its "稅率結構" (tax rate structure), which are key fiscal policies for income redistribution (Target 10.4).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Discusses "房地合一稅" (property transaction tax), which relates to the housing market, a component of urban policy, but the link to affordability is not explicit (Target 11.1).
evidence: 自用住宅財產交易所得稅

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The mention of "能源稅及環境稅" (Energy tax and environmental tax) directly relates to restructuring taxation to reflect environmental impacts and encourage sustainable consumption (Target 12.c).

Climate Action.reason: Discusses "能源稅及環境稅" (Energy tax and environmental tax), which are policy instruments for integrating climate change measures into national fiscal planning (Target 13.2).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is centered on the "rule of law" (Target 16.3) in taxation, covering "租稅法律主義" (tax legalism) and "反避稅條款" to build transparent institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The entire course on tax law provides a deep understanding of the mechanisms for domestic revenue collection, which is the core of Target 17.1 (Strengthen domestic resource mobilization).
